who: warehouse managers in e-commerce processing 50–100 orders/week
offer: For warehouse managers in e-commerce processing 50–100 orders/week, inefficient inventory turnover causes excess stock and missed sales opportunities. We provide an inventory turnover analyzer instead of manual inventory tracking spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient inventory turnover leading to excess stock and missed sales opportunities
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for warehouse managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on inventory tools
DM outreach to warehouse managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for warehouse managers
try_it: Let users try real-time tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
